fn read_with_errno(fd: libc::c_int, buf: &mut [u8]) -> isize {
    let result = unsafe { libc::read(fd, buf.as_mut_ptr() as *mut libc::c_void, buf.len()) };
    if result == -1 {
        let _log = format!("read failed, errno: {}", unsafe { *libc::__errno_location() });
        let _ = unsafe { libc::close(fd) };
        let errno_after_close = unsafe { *libc::__errno_location() };
        return -(errno_after_close as isize);
    }
    result
}
